name: Make-Ahead Brunch Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Generously grease a 13 x 9-inch pan.
2. Arrange bread cubes in the bottom of the dish.
3. Layer cheese, green onions, green pepper, mushrooms, and tomatoes on top of the bread.
4. In a large bowl, combine eggs, milk, and seasonings; mix well.
5. Pour egg mixture over bread.
6. Sprinkle bacon evenly over the top.
7. Cover; refrigerate overnight.
8. Preheat oven to 325°F.
9. Bake uncovered for 50 to 60 minutes, or until the center is set.
10. Stand for 10 minutes before serving.
11. Makes 12 servings.
